dimensions.label: Problem clarity
dimensions.guide: Is the pain point obvious and worth solving?

dimensions.label: Demo explainability
dimensions.guide: Can a judge understand the product quickly from the demo?

dimensions.label: Technical depth
dimensions.guide: Does the implementation show real engineering substance?

dimensions.label: Product completeness
dimensions.guide: Does it feel like a usable product rather than a concept?

dimensions.label: Code quality
dimensions.guide: Repo organization, docs, tests, maintainability signals.

dimensions.label: Innovation
dimensions.guide: Is there a differentiated insight or novel approach?

dimensions.label: GenLayer / track fit
dimensions.guide: Is the project genuinely aligned to the GenLayer / entered tracks?

notes: Automated signals help pre-score code quality and polish, but final judging should still include human review of demo and track fit.
Missing repo/demo assets should reduce confidence, not automatically zero the project.
